Work Experience

Field Operations

SOC Analyst Trainee
Aug 2025 – Present
TryHackMe & LetsDefend — Remote
  • Monitored security alerts in real-time and triaged incidents using Splunk SIEM, reducing false-positive escalations through accurate classification.
  • Investigated suspicious network traffic with Wireshark, identifying malicious patterns including port scanning, DNS tunneling, and ARP poisoning.
  • Analyzed Windows Event Logs (IDs 4624, 4625, 4688, 4720) and Linux /var/log/auth.log to reconstruct attack timelines.
  • Detected and documented phishing campaigns, brute-force attacks, ICMP tunneling, and DNS exfiltration activity across simulated enterprise environments.
  • Executed the full incident response lifecycle — identification, containment, eradication, recovery, and formal report writing — for 10+ simulated incidents.
  • Applied Snort IDS rules to analyze network alerts and distinguish benign traffic from active intrusion attempts.

Incident Analysis & Response Project
// August 2024

Conducted end-to-end incident analysis on simulated cyber attacks including phishing, port scanning, and ARP poisoning in controlled lab environments. Produced structured incident reports detailing attack vectors, indicators of compromise (IOCs), affected systems, and recommended containment and remediation steps. Applied a structured incident response framework throughout to ensure methodical and complete handling of each simulated event.
